properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There Is An Unseen Hand To Me That Leads Through Ways I Cannot See. While Going Through This World Of Woe This Hand Still Leads Me As I Go.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’m Trusting To The Unseen Hand, That Guides Me, Through This Weary Land. And Some Sweet Day, I’ll Reach That Strand, Still Guided By The, Unseen Hand.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His Hand Has Led Through The Shadows Drear And While It Leads I Have No Fear. I Know It’ll Lead Me To That Home Where Sin Or Sorrow Never Shall Come.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I Long To See My Savior’s Face, And Sing The Story Saved By Grace. And There Upon That Golden Strand I’ll Thank Him For His Guiding Hand.
